title: CraftGlow Stardew Valley Swords
description: Brings every sword from Stardew Valley into Minecraft as detailed.
body:
<details>
<summary>English</summary>

This resource pack brings all Stardew Valley swords into Minecraft using custom pixel-art textures! CIT support is required – just rename any sword to get one of the iconic weapons.

🔹 Includes every Stardew Valley sword, from Rusty Sword to Infinity Blade

🔹 Pixel-art textures that match Minecraft’s visual style

🔹 Requires OptiFine or CIT Resewn – works with renamed swords of any material

🔹 Made for Minecraft 1.20.2+

📥 Download now and bring Stardew Valley combat into Minecraft!

Rename any sword (wood, stone, iron, gold, diamond, or netherite) to one of the following names:


```
Rusty Sword - Rusty Sword  
Steel Smallsword - Steel Smallsword  
Wooden Blade - Wooden Blade  
Pirate's Sword - Pirate Sword  
Silver Saber - Silver Saber  
Cutlass - Cutlass  
Forest Sword - Forest Sword  
Iron Edge - Iron Edge  
Insect Head - Insect Head  
Bone Sword - Bone Sword  
Claymore - Claymore  
Neptune's Glaive - Neptune Glaive  
Templar's Blade - Templar Blade  
Obsidian Edge - Obsidian Edge  
Ossified Blade - Ossified Blade  
Holy Blade - Holy Blade  
Tempered Broadsword - Tempered Broadsword  
Yeti Tooth - Yeti Tooth  
Steel Falchion - Steel Falchion  
Dark Sword - Dark Sword  
Lava Katana - Lava Katana  
Dragontooth Cutlass - Dragontooth   
Dwarf Sword - Dwarf Sword  
Galaxy Sword - Galaxy Sword  
Infinity Blade - Infinity Blade  
Haley's Iron - Haley Iron  
Leah's Whittler - Leah Whittler  
Meowmere - Meowmere
```


</details>

<details>
<summary>Polski</summary>

Ten resource pack dodaje wszystkie miecze ze Stardew Valley do Minecrafta jako tekstury pixel-art! Wymagane jest CIT – wystarczy zmienić nazwę dowolnego miecza, aby uzyskać jeden z legendarnych mieczy.

🔹 Zawiera wszystkie miecze ze Stardew Valley – od Rusty Sword po Infinity Blade

🔹 Tekstury pixel-art dopasowane do stylu Minecrafta

🔹 Wymaga OptiFine lub CIT Resewn – działa z każdym typem miecza

🔹 Stworzony dla Minecraft 1.20.2+

📥 Pobierz teraz i walcz w stylu Stardew Valley!

Zmień nazwę dowolnego miecza (drewnianego, kamiennego, żelaznego, złotego, diamentowego lub netherite), aby uzyskać jedną z poniższych wersji:

```
Rusty Sword - Rusty Sword  
Steel Smallsword - Steel Smallsword  
Wooden Blade - Wooden Blade  
Pirate's Sword - Pirate Sword  
Silver Saber - Silver Saber  
Cutlass - Cutlass  
Forest Sword - Forest Sword  
Iron Edge - Iron Edge  
Insect Head - Insect Head  
Bone Sword - Bone Sword  
Claymore - Claymore  
Neptune's Glaive - Neptune Glaive  
Templar's Blade - Templar Blade  
Obsidian Edge - Obsidian Edge  
Ossified Blade - Ossified Blade  
Holy Blade - Holy Blade  
Tempered Broadsword - Tempered Broadsword  
Yeti Tooth - Yeti Tooth  
Steel Falchion - Steel Falchion  
Dark Sword - Dark Sword  
Lava Katana - Lava Katana  
Dragontooth Cutlass - Dragontooth   
Dwarf Sword - Dwarf Sword  
Galaxy Sword - Galaxy Sword  
Infinity Blade - Infinity Blade  
Haley's Iron - Haley Iron  
Leah's Whittler - Leah Whittler  
Meowmere - Meowmere
```

</details>


<details>
<summary>Español</summary>


Este paquete de texturas agrega todas las espadas de Stardew Valley a Minecraft con texturas pixel-art. Se requiere CIT – simplemente cambia el nombre de cualquier espada para obtener una de las armas clásicas.

🔹 Incluye todas las espadas de Stardew Valley, desde Rusty Sword hasta Infinity Blade

🔹 Texturas pixel-art adaptadas al estilo de Minecraft

🔹 Requiere OptiFine o CIT Resewn – funciona con espadas de cualquier material

🔹 Diseñado para Minecraft 1.20.2+

📥 ¡Descárgalo ahora y lucha como en Stardew Valley!

Cambia el nombre de cualquier espada (de madera, piedra, hierro, oro, diamante o netherite) para obtener una de las siguientes versiones:


```
Rusty Sword - Rusty Sword  
Steel Smallsword - Steel Smallsword  
Wooden Blade - Wooden Blade  
Pirate's Sword - Pirate Sword  
Silver Saber - Silver Saber  
Cutlass - Cutlass  
Forest Sword - Forest Sword  
Iron Edge - Iron Edge  
Insect Head - Insect Head  
Bone Sword - Bone Sword  
Claymore - Claymore  
Neptune's Glaive - Neptune Glaive  
Templar's Blade - Templar Blade  
Obsidian Edge - Obsidian Edge  
Ossified Blade - Ossified Blade  
Holy Blade - Holy Blade  
Tempered Broadsword - Tempered Broadsword  
Yeti Tooth - Yeti Tooth  
Steel Falchion - Steel Falchion  
Dark Sword - Dark Sword  
Lava Katana - Lava Katana  
Dragontooth Cutlass - Dragontooth   
Dwarf Sword - Dwarf Sword  
Galaxy Sword - Galaxy Sword  
Infinity Blade - Infinity Blade  
Haley's Iron - Haley Iron  
Leah's Whittler - Leah Whittler  
Meowmere - Meowmere
```


</details>
